title: Just Enough Optimization
description: Just Enough Optimization - Focused on low memory usage and higher avarege fps. Made for low-end pc so everyone can run Minecraft
body:
# JEOM - Just Enough Optimization

(m is for modrinth)
[Curseforge version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/jeom)

My PC setups for all versions above 1.20.1:

    CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 4600G
    RAM: 16 GB DDR4 (2GB allocated for Minecraft)
    Storage: 480GB NVMe2 SSD
    GPU: NVIDIA GTX 1050 with 2GB VRAM

My PC setups for all versions below 1.20.1:

    CPU: INTEL I3 5005U
    RAM: 4 GB DDR3 (2GB allocated for Minecraft)
    Storage: 111GB SSD
    GPU: INTEL HD GRAPHICS 5500

#  About JEOM:

JEOM is engineered for players who crave top-tier performance in Minecraft. This modpack is built from the ground up with the following goals:

    High FPS: Experience fluid gameplay with minimal lag, even during intense sessions.
    Low Memory Usage: Runs efficiently, making the most of your system’s resources.
    Lightweight Design: Includes only the essentials, cutting out excess to keep things lean.
    Fast Booting: Jump into your world faster with reduced loading times.

Simplicity is key. JEOM skips fancy visual upgrades that could slow you down, focusing instead on delivering maximum performance without compromise.

Updates and Optimization:

Every new version of JEOM brings freshly optimized configurations, ensuring you get the best performance possible. I dedicated to refining the modpack with each update, taking advantage of the latest improvements.

Got Bugs, Suggestions, or Version Requests?

We’d love to hear from you! Drop your thoughts in the CurseForge comment section. Your feedback helps me make JEOM even better for everyone.
